entity.summary: Aptos-based proprietary automated market maker with current on-chain swap activity tracked from protocol event streams.
entity.notes: No canonical public website was recovered in this research cluster. Active status is based on recent Aptos DEX volume and an explicit on-chain event adapter. Launch date remains null.

evidence.title: Caliber DEX volume profile
evidence.notes: Protocol profile reports recent Aptos DEX volume and identifies Caliber as a Prop AMM.

evidence.title: Aptos Caliber Prop AMM volume adapter
evidence.notes: Adapter identifies the Aptos Caliber Prop AMM swap event streams and volume methodology.
